response_text:
ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_code : varchar
ATTR city_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY City
PK city_code
ATTR city_code : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_code
ATTR registration_code : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK
ATTR scheduled_date : date
ATTR scheduled_time : time
ATTR status : varchar
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_time : time

ENTITY FlightRoute
PK flight_code
PK origin_airport_code
PK destination_airport_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR origin_airport_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR destination_airport_code : varchar : PK : FK

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK flight_code
PK crew_id
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY BaggageBelt
PK belt_code
ATTR belt_code : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_code : varchar : FK

REL Airport -> City : 1 -> 1..N : FK=city_code
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=registration_code
REL Flight -> FlightRoute : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_code
REL FlightRoute -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=origin_airport_code
REL FlightRoute -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=destination_airport_code
REL CrewAssignment -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_code
REL CrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1..N -> 1 : FK=crew_id
REL BaggageBelt -> Flight : 0..1 -> 1 : FK=flight_code
